how_to_cite: Weiskittel, A. R. (2026). PERSEUS Forest Intelligence: a CONUS multi-model forest carbon, value, and risk decision-support tool. Center for Research on Sustainable Forests, University of Maine. holoros.github.io/perseus-forest-intelligence
